name: Observer
ability: Each night, choose a player: you learn how many reminder tokens are on them.
flavor: Alright, you, a little to the left, and you, shoulders back. Okay, now everyone, say cheese! (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.
otherNightReminder: The Observer chooses a player. Give a finger signal.

name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you gain the ability of an alive neighbor's (you don't know which) character until dusk.
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.5)
firstNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap their character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap their character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Arctic Fox with the Spy ability doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Widow ability doesn't see the grimoire.

name: Skulker
ability: Each night, choose a player: until dusk, if you die & they are not the Demon, swap characters with them & they die instead.
flavor: You say you don't want me, but then you look for me. You push me under the belly, but then you wonder why I am quiet. You build walls around me, but then you ask "Can't you climb?" Then you call for me, and I am here. (v1.4)
firstNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:

name: Shoe Shiner
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: a chosen good player swaps characters with you & is then drunk.
flavor: What you wear on the outside reflects who you are on the inside, so if your outside is covered in dirt and grime, I'll assume you have a grimy soul! Why have a grimy soul when you can have a shining soul? (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: The Shoe Shiner might choose a player. If necessary, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token & wake the chosen player & do the same. :reminder: :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Shoe Shiner might choose a player. If necessary, show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token & wake the chosen player & do the same. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Vet
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: if they are of opposing alignment & not the Demon, they become a Vet.
flavor: This is mechanically impossible! It-it's a scientific breakthrough! How could something so small and feeble scale such a great height? (v1.3)
firstNightReminder: The Vet might choose a player. If they chose an opposing player, replace the target's token with a Vet token. Put the Vet to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & Vet tokens. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Vet might choose a player. If they chose an opposing player, replace the target's token with a Vet token. Put the Vet to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & Vet tokens. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: If the Epidemic is in play, an evil player may become a Vet due to the Vet's ability.
A Moonlit may become a Vet due to the Vet's ability.

name: Poet
ability: Once per game, during the day, publicly claim to be the Poet: the Demon is drunk until dawn.
flavor: A poet who never knows it certainly doesn't owe it to show it how far they can throw it. They may dip their toes in the riverbed, before throwing their greens into a piano's strings. "For you, a tear I shed", she pled as she bled, closer than ever to dead, no light further ahead. (v1.2)

name: Vintner
ability: If you died tonight, your alive neighbors swap characters. This can't create a good Demon.
otherNightReminder: If the Vintner died tonight, swap their alive neighbors' character tokens. Wake each neighbor 1 at a time & show the *YOU ARE* & their new character tokens.

jinxes.reason: If the Epidemic is in play, the Vinter may create a good Demon.
If the Moonlit is in play, the Vinter may create a good Demon.

name: Pitied
ability: If you are the last living good player, good wins.
flavor: If things are going to continue to suck THIS badly, God eventually will look down on me and spare me some grace eventually, right...? (v1.1)

name: Anesthetist
ability: Each night, 1 of your alive neighbors might not wake tonight.

name: Sandman
ability: Each night, choose a player: they don't wake tonight.

name: Hypnotist
ability: Each night, choose a player, a character & alignment they think they become.
flavor: Five, three, four, two, zero, one. Three, five, two, four, one, zero. It is 11:59 PM. Now, it is 12:00 AM. (v1.3)
firstNightReminder: The Hypnotist chooses a player & a character & alignment. Put the Hypnotist to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & the chosen character token & the chosen alignment.
otherNightReminder: The Hypnotist chooses a player & a character & alignment. Put the Hypnotist to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & the chosen character token & the chosen alignment.

name: Ectoplastic
ability: All players register as alive, keep their eyes closed when voting & the vote tally is secret.
flavor: The Ectoplastic pulses. The Ectoplastic shines. The Ectoplastic throbs. The Ectoplastic grovels. The Ectoplastic is here. (v2.2)

name: Waste
ability: Each night, choose a player & a good character they become: the previously chosen character dies.
flavor: It was soon after the skyscrapers melted that the Waste arose. It was soon after the sky fell that the Waste awoke. It was soon after the pets became monsters and the people became horrors that the Waste shined its brightest. (v1.6)
firstNightReminder: The Waste chooses a player & a character. Put the Waste to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Waste chooses a player & a character. Put the Waste to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token. :reminder: The previously chosen character dies. :reminder:

name: Conductor
ability: Once per game, privately choose a Fabled or Loric to add. When doing this, the Storyteller may prompt you to choose differently. When you die, the Fabled or Loric is removed.

name: Snafu
ability: If the Storyteller makes a mistake, all players know this & the black sliver gets bigger.
flavor: Don't worry about it. Don't worry about it! You really don't need to worry about it. (v1.0)
